Bash(cd "C:/LinkDropV2/apps/api" && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from pathlib import Path
import json, os

project_root = Path\('C:/LinkDropV2/apps/api/../..'\).resolve\(\)
tools_dir = project_root / 'packages' / 'tools'
print\('project_root:', project_root\)
print\('tools_dir:', tools_dir, '| exists:', tools_dir.exists\(\)\)

skills = []
for skill_dir in tools_dir.glob\('skill-*'\):
    if not skill_dir.is_dir\(\): continue
    manifest_path = skill_dir / 'manifest.json'
    if manifest_path.exists\(\):
        with open\(manifest_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
            m = json.load\(f\)
            skills.append\(m\)
            print\('  OK:', m.get\('id'\)\)
    else:
        print\('  NO manifest:', skill_dir.name\)
print\('Total:', len\(skills\)\)
")

Bash(cd "C:/LinkDropV2/apps/api" && python -c "
import asyncio, json, os
from pathlib import Path

async def list_skills\(\):
    project_root = Path\('C:/LinkDropV2/apps/api/main.py'\).parent.parent.parent
    tools_dir = project_root / 'packages' / 'tools'
    print\('[test] tools_dir:', tools_dir\)
    skills = []
    for skill_dir in tools_dir.glob\('skill-*'\):
        if not skill_dir.is_dir\(\): continue
        manifest_path = skill_dir / 'manifest.json'
        if manifest_path.exists\(\):
            with open\(manifest_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
                skills.append\(json.load\(f\)\)
    return sorted\(skills, key=lambda x: \(x.get\('category', 0\), x.get\('label_number', '99'\)\)\)

result = asyncio.run\(list_skills\(\)\)
print\('Result count:', len\(result\)\)
for s in result:
    print\(' -', s.get\('id'\), s.get\('name'\)\)
")

import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert\(0, str\(Path\('../opal-access'\).resolve\(\)\)\)

from notebooklm_tools import NotebookLMClient
from notebooklm_tools.core.auth import load_cached_tokens
from notebooklm_tools.services import notebooks as nlm_notebooks

tokens = load_cached_tokens\(\)
client = NotebookLMClient\(cookies=tokens.cookies, csrf_token=tokens.csrf_token, session_id=tokens.session_id\)

result = nlm_notebooks.list_notebooks\(client=client\)
existing = {nb['id']: nb for nb in result.get\('notebooks', []\)}

import json
with open\('../../../apps/web/src/data/content_longform.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

print\('=' * 70\)
print\(f'{'템플릿':20}  {'노트북 제목':30}  {'소스':>5}  상태'\)
print\('=' * 70\)
for t in data['templates']:
    nid = t['notebookId']
    nb  = existing.get\(nid\)
    if nb:
        src = nb.get\('source_count', 0\)
        status = '✅ 준비됨' if src >= 5 else \('⚠️  소스 부족' if src > 0 else '❌ 소스 없음'\)
        print\(f'{t[\\"id\\"]:20}  {nb[\\"title\\"][:30]:30}  {src:>5}개  {status}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{t[\\"id\\"]:20}  {'\(노트북 없음\)':30}  {'?':>5}   ❌ 노트북 없음'\)
print\('=' * 70\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/LinkDropV2/packages/tools/skill-2-video-longform1/opal-manager" && python -c "
import sys, io, json
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert\(0, str\(Path\('../opal-access'\).resolve\(\)\)\)

from notebooklm_tools import NotebookLMClient
from notebooklm_tools.core.auth import load_cached_tokens
from notebooklm_tools.services import notebooks as nlm_notebooks

tokens = load_cached_tokens\(\)
client = NotebookLMClient\(cookies=tokens.cookies, csrf_token=tokens.csrf_token, session_id=tokens.session_id\)

result = nlm_notebooks.list_notebooks\(client=client\)
existing = {nb['id']: nb for nb in result.get\('notebooks', []\)}

with open\('../../../apps/web/src/data/content_longform.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

print\('=' * 72\)
for t in data['templates']:
    nid = t['notebookId']
    nb  = existing.get\(nid\)
    if nb:
        src = nb.get\('source_count', 0\)
        if src >= 5:   status = 'OK'
        elif src > 0:  status = 'PARTIAL'
        else:          status = 'EMPTY'
        print\(f\\"{t['id']:<20}  {nb['title'][:32]:<32}  {src:>3}개  {status}\\"\)
    else:
        print\(f\\"{t['id']:<20}  {'\(없음\)':<32}  {'?':>3}     MISSING\\"\)
print\('=' * 72\)
" 2>&1)

notebooks = client.list_notebooks\(\)

" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/LinkDropV2/packages/tools/skill-2-video-longform1/opal-manager" && python -X utf8 -c "
import os, time, tempfile
from pathlib import Path

for line in Path\('C:/LinkDropV2/.env'\).read_text\(\).splitlines\(\):
    if '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k, v = line.split\('=', 1\); os.environ.setdefault\(k.strip\(\), v.strip\(\)\)

from logic import PipelineJob, ClipStatus, _real_render, _step4_local_merge
from keyframe_generator import generate_keyframes

work = Path\(tempfile.gettempdir\(\)\) / f'pipeline_test_{int\(time.time\(\)\)}'
work.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)

job = PipelineJob\(
    app_id='health-senior', topic='건강 음식 TOP 3',
    voice='ko-KR-Wavenet-D', art_prompt='neo-noir graphic novel',
    work_dir=work,
\)
job.clips = [
    ClipStatus\(index=0, scene_text='의사들이 60대에게 권고하는 식품이 있습니다.', estimated_sec=8.0\),
    ClipStatus\(index=1, scene_text='달걀 하루 두 개가 근육 손실을 37% 늦춥니다.', estimated_sec=8.0\),
    ClipStatus\(index=2, scene_text='오늘부터 실천해보세요. 댓글로 알려주세요!', estimated_sec=7.0\),
]
job.estimated_total_sec = 23.0

print\('키프레임 생성...'\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
keyframes = generate_keyframes\(job, work\)
print\(f'  {len\(keyframes\)}개 완료 \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
for i, clip in enumerate\(job.clips\):
    clip.keyframe_path = keyframes[i]

print\('TTS + 클립 렌더링...'\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
def noop\(j\): pass
for clip in job.clips:
    clip.state = 'rendering'
    _real_render\(clip, noop, job\)
    clip.state = 'done'
    print\(f'  씬{clip.index+1}: {clip.local_path.stat\(\).st_size//1024}KB'\)
print\(f'  렌더링 완료 \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)

print\('병합...'\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
final = _step4_local_merge\(job, job.clips\)
p = Path\(final\)
if p.exists\(\):
    print\(f'최종: {p.name} \({p.stat\(\).st_size//1024}KB\) \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
    print\('파이프라인 성공!'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/LinkDropV2/packages/tools/skill-2-video-longform1/opal-manager" && python -X utf8 << 'EOF'
import os, time, tempfile
from pathlib import Path

for line in Path\('C:/LinkDropV2/.env'\).read_text\(\).splitlines\(\):
    if '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k, v = line.split\('=', 1\); os.environ.setdefault\(k.strip\(\), v.strip\(\)\)

# Pillow 폴백만 사용 \(NLM 건너뜀\)
from keyframe_generator import _make_all_gradient_keyframes, _extract_art_style_id
from logic import PipelineJob, ClipStatus, _real_render, _step4_local_merge, KEYFRAME_W, KEYFRAME_H

work = Path\(tempfile.gettempdir\(\)\) / f'pipeline_test_{int\(time.time\(\)\)}'
work.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)

job = PipelineJob\(
    app_id='health-senior', topic='건강 음식 TOP 3',
    voice='ko-KR-Wavenet-D', art_prompt='neo-noir graphic novel',
    work_dir=work,
\)
job.clips = [
    ClipStatus\(index=0, scene_text='의사들이 60대에게 권고하는 식품이 있습니다.', estimated_sec=8.0\),
    ClipStatus\(index=1, scene_text='달걀 하루 두 개가 근육 손실을 37% 늦춥니다.', estimated_sec=8.0\),
    ClipStatus\(index=2, scene_text='오늘부터 실천해보세요. 댓글로 알려주세요!', estimated_sec=7.0\),
]
job.estimated_total_sec = 23.0

print\('[키프레임] Pillow 폴백 생성...'\)
art = _extract_art_style_id\(job.art_prompt\)
keyframes = _make_all_gradient_keyframes\(len\(job.clips\), art, work\)
for i, clip in enumerate\(job.clips\):
    clip.keyframe_path = keyframes[i]
print\(f'  {len\(keyframes\)}개 생성 완료'\)

print\('[TTS + FFmpeg] 클립 렌더링...'\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
def noop\(j\): pass
for clip in job.clips:
    clip.state = 'rendering'
    _real_render\(clip, noop, job\)
    clip.state = 'done'
    print\(f'  씬{clip.index+1}: {clip.local_path.stat\(\).st_size//1024}KB'\)
print\(f'  완료 \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)

print\('[병합] FFmpeg concat...'\)
final = _step4_local_merge\(job, job.clips\)
p = Path\(final\)
if p.exists\(\):
    print\(f'SUCCESS: {p.name} \({p.stat\(\).st_size//1024}KB\)'\)
EOF)

for line in Path\('C:/LinkDropV2/.env'\).read_text\(\).splitlines\(\):

# 기존 완성 아티팩트 상태 + slide_deck_url 확인
from notebooklm_tools import NotebookLMClient
from notebooklm_tools.core.auth import load_cached_tokens
from notebooklm_tools.services import studio as nlm_studio

tokens = load_cached_tokens\(\)
client = NotebookLMClient\(cookies=tokens.cookies, csrf_token=tokens.csrf_token, session_id=tokens.session_id\)
notebook_id = "b9d4db2d-bc89-46a6-b5ec-b85579c8dc30"

status = nlm_studio.get_studio_status\(client, notebook_id\)
print\(f"총 아티팩트: {status['total']}, 완료: {status['completed']}, 진행중: {status['in_progress']}"\)
for a in status.get\("artifacts", []\):
    aid = a.get\("artifact_id",""\)[:8]
    st = a.get\("status",""\)
    tp = a.get\("type",""\)
    url = a.get\("slide_deck_url",""\) or ""
    print\(f"  {aid}... {tp:12s} {st:12s} url={'있음\(' + str\(len\(url\)\) + 'chars\)' if url else '없음'}"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "C:/LinkDropV2/packages/tools/skill-2-video-longform1/opal-manager" && python -X utf8 << 'EOF'
import os, time, tempfile
from pathlib import Path

for line in Path\('C:/LinkDropV2/.env'\).read_text\(\).splitlines\(\):
    if '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k, v = line.split\('=', 1\); os.environ.setdefault\(k.strip\(\), v.strip\(\)\)

from logic import PipelineJob, ClipStatus, _real_render, _step4_local_merge
from keyframe_generator import generate_keyframes, _extract_art_style_id, _make_all_gradient_keyframes

# ─── Pillow 키프레임으로 빠른 전체 파이프라인 테스트 ─────────────────────
work = Path\(tempfile.gettempdir\(\)\) / f'final_test_{int\(time.time\(\)\)}'
work.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)

job = PipelineJob\(
    app_id='health-senior', topic='혈압을 낮추는 식품 TOP 5',
    voice='ko-KR-Wavenet-D', art_prompt='ink-wash traditional oriental calligraphy style',
    work_dir=work,
\)
job.clips = [
    ClipStatus\(index=0, scene_text='하루에 마늘 두 쪽만 먹어도 혈압이 10% 내려간다는 사실, 알고 계셨나요?', estimated_sec=10.5\),
    ClipStatus\(index=1, scene_text='5위는 연어입니다. 오메가3 성분이 혈관을 유연하게 만들어 혈압을 낮춥니다.', estimated_sec=9.8\),
    ClipStatus\(index=2, scene_text='4위, 바나나. 칼륨 함량이 높아 나트륨 배출을 도와 혈압을 안정시킵니다.', estimated_sec=9.2\),
    ClipStatus\(index=3, scene_text='오늘 알려드린 5가지를 매일 식탁에 올려보세요. 댓글로 실천 다짐 남겨주세요!', estimated_sec=10.0\),
]
job.estimated_total_sec = 39.5

t_start = time.time\(\)
print\('[1] Pillow 키프레임 생성 \(art_style: ink-wash\)...'\)
art = _extract_art_style_id\(job.art_prompt\)
keyframes = _make_all_gradient_keyframes\(len\(job.clips\), art, work\)
for i, clip in enumerate\(job.clips\):
    clip.keyframe_path = keyframes[i]
print\(f'    {len\(keyframes\)}개 \({time.time\(\)-t_start:.1f}s\)'\)

print\('[2] TTS + FFmpeg 클립 병렬 렌더링...'\)
import concurrent.futures
def noop\(j\): pass
def render\(clip\):
    clip.state = 'rendering'
    _real_render\(clip, noop, job\)
    clip.state = 'done'
    return clip

t2 = time.time\(\)
with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor\(max_workers=4\) as pool:
    results = list\(pool.map\(render, job.clips\)\)
for c in results:
    print\(f'    씬{c.index+1}: {c.local_path.stat\(\).st_size//1024}KB'\)
print\(f'    완료 \({time.time\(\)-t2:.1f}s\)'\)

print\('[3] FFmpeg 병합 + BGM...'\)
t3 = time.time\(\)
final = _step4_local_merge\(job, results\)
p = Path\(final\)
print\(f'    최종: {p.name} \({p.stat\(\).st_size//1024}KB\) \({time.time\(\)-t3:.1f}s\)'\)
print\(f'\\n전체 소요: {time.time\(\)-t_start:.1f}초'\)
print\('✅ 파이프라인 성공!'\)
EOF)

import sys, httpx, hashlib, time, os
sys.path.insert\(0, 'C:/LinkDropV2/packages/tools/skill-2-video-longform1/opal-access'\)
from opal_auth import OpalAuthManager

m = OpalAuthManager\(\)
s = m.load_session\(\)
bearer = s.bearer_token
cookies = s.cookie_header

proxy_url = 'https://opal.google/board/blobs/labs-opal-prod-blobs/686eaead-700f-403d-b973-4da70c71f1a2'

r = httpx.get\(proxy_url, headers={
    'Authorization': bearer,
    'Cookie': cookies,
    'Referer': 'https://opal.google/',
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36',
}, timeout=30, follow_redirects=True\)

print\('status:', r.status_code\)
print\('content-type:', r.headers.get\('content-type'\)\)
print\('content-length:', len\(r.content\)\)

if r.status_code == 200 and len\(r.content\) > 1000:
    os.makedirs\('C:/tmp/opal_test', exist_ok=True\)
    out = 'C:/tmp/opal_test/test_keyframe.jpg'
    open\(out, 'wb'\).write\(r.content\)
    print\('이미지 저장 완료:', out, f'\({len\(r.content\)//1024}KB\)'\)
else:
    print\('오류:', r.text[:200]\)
" 2>&1)
